conbody.p: The Overdue Clarification Report displays the clarification status overdue and response status pending of a CDS.
Activity Date and Admit Date can be used to filter the data. Default value for Activity Date filter is set to last one week from the current date.

The Overdue Clarification Report displays the following KPI cards and charts:
Encounters with Overdue Clarification
Overdue Clarification with Provider
Overdue Clarification by Encounter Status
